customErrorMessages.errorMessage: לא ניתן לפתוח פניה, תחילה יש לבדוק שדה טלפון ומייל

Flow.description: Includes all of the workflows that are triggered on Create/Edit The name of the decision is the name of the previous workflow. V7- validation of phone and other phone - trigger patient com details to case decision V24 - adding Date\time of initial call in yadbeyad cases.
Flow.label: Case Workflow to Flow- Created/Edited
